requirement_topic.en: Unintentional Radiated & Conducted Emissions — FCC Part 15 Subpart B (GaN Fast Charger / Switching Power Supply)
requirement_topic.zh: 非故意辐射与传导发射限值 — FCC第15部分B子部分（GaN快充/开关电源）
requirement_topic.zht: 非故意輻射與傳導發射限值 — FCC第15部分B子部分（GaN快充/開關電源）

summary.en: A GaN fast charger is a switching power supply and qualifies as an unintentional radiator under FCC Part 15 Subpart B (47 CFR §§15.101–15.124). It must comply with Class B conducted emission limits (§15.107) and Class B radiated emission limits (§15.109) because it is marketed for use in a residential environment. Class B limits are stricter than Class A and apply to devices sold to the general public regardless of whether they are also used commercially. GaN chargers operate at switching frequencies typically in the range of 100 kHz–10 MHz (far higher than silicon MOSFETs), which pushes harmonic energy into higher frequency bands and makes EMI suppression a critical design challenge — filter design, PCB layout, shielding, and component selection all affect compliance. Compliance is demonstrated via a Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC); no FCC registration or pre-market approval is required. Test methods: ANSI C63.4 (radiated, conducted). The responsible party must be located in the US or have a designated US agent. Test records must be retained for 2 years after last date of manufacture. Note: FCC Report and Order FCC 25-27 (ET Docket 24-136, adopted 22 May 2025) prohibits Chinese-government-controlled labs from participating in the equipment authorization program. Reports from labs affected by these recognition restrictions may not be usable for SDoC/certification purposes. Choose a competent, accredited lab and document its current acceptability; verify lab recognition status at fcc.gov/oet/ea before commissioning tests.
summary.zh: GaN快速充电器属于开关电源，依据FCC第15部分B子部分（47 CFR §§15.101–15.124）归类为非故意辐射体。由于其面向住宅环境销售，须符合B类传导发射限值（§15.107）和B类辐射发射限值（§15.109）。B类限值比A类更严格，适用于面向普通消费者销售的设备，无论是否同时用于商业场合。GaN充电器开关频率通常在100 kHz至10 MHz范围内（远高于硅MOSFET），谐波能量延伸至更高频段，使EMI抑制成为关键设计挑战——滤波器设计、PCB布局、屏蔽措施及元件选型均影响合规性。合规通过供应商合规声明（SDoC）证明，无需FCC注册或上市前审批。测试方法：ANSI C63.4（辐射、传导）。责任方须位于美国或指定美国代理人。测试记录须保存至最后生产日期后2年。注意：截至2025年，FCC已拒绝承认或正在限制多个中国政府控制实验室；制造商应使用MRA合作国或美国境内的认可实验室，以确保测试报告被FCC接受。
summary.zht: GaN快速充電器屬於開關電源，依據FCC第15部分B子部分（47 CFR §§15.101–15.124）歸類為非故意輻射體。由於其面向住宅環境銷售，須符合B類傳導發射限值（§15.107）和B類輻射發射限值（§15.109）。B類限值比A類更嚴格，適用於面向普通消費者銷售的設備，無論是否同時用於商業場合。GaN充電器開關頻率通常在100 kHz至10 MHz範圍內（遠高於矽MOSFET），諧波能量延伸至更高頻段，使EMI抑制成為關鍵設計挑戰——濾波器設計、PCB佈局、屏蔽措施及元件選型均影響合規性。合規通過供應商合規聲明（SDoC）證明，無需FCC注冊或上市前審批。測試方法：ANSI C63.4（輻射、傳導）。責任方須位於美國或指定美國代理人。測試記錄須保存至最後生產日期後2年。注意：截至2025年，FCC已拒絕承認或正在限制多個中國政府控制實驗室；製造商應使用MRA合作國或美國境內的認可實驗室，以確保測試報告被FCC接受。

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR Part 15, Subpart B (FCC Rules — Unintentional Radiators)
ANSI C63.4 (measurement methods for radiated and conducted emissions from low-voltage electrical and electronic equipment)

summary.en: Chinese GaN charger manufacturers typically certify to GB/T 9254 (identical to CISPR 32, Multimedia Equipment Emissions), which sets conducted and radiated emission limits for multimedia and IT equipment including switching power supplies. GB/T 9254.1-2021 covers Class A and Class B limits and aligns technically with CISPR 32:2015. Manufacturers may also hold CE test reports to EN 55032 (the European adoption of CISPR 32). However, neither GB/T 9254 test reports nor EN 55032 test reports are directly accepted by the FCC — the FCC requires ANSI C63.4-based test reports executed under FCC Part 15 limits and SDoC documentation. The underlying limit values in CISPR 32 and FCC Part 15 Class B differ at several frequency sub-bands, so a product passing GB/T 9254 is not guaranteed to pass FCC Part 15 without re-measurement. [UNVERIFIED: the exact frequency-by-frequency limit comparison between GB/T 9254.1-2021 and 47 CFR §15.107/§15.109 at all sub-bands; manufacturers should obtain a gap analysis from an accredited lab.]
summary.zh: 中国GaN充电器制造商通常依据GB/T 9254（等同于CISPR 32，多媒体设备发射标准）取证，该标准为包括开关电源在内的多媒体及IT设备规定了传导和辐射发射限值。GB/T 9254.1-2021涵盖A类和B类限值，技术上与CISPR 32:2015对齐。制造商可能同时持有EN 55032（CISPR 32的欧洲采用版）的CE测试报告。但GB/T 9254测试报告和EN 55032测试报告均不被FCC直接接受——FCC要求基于ANSI C63.4的测试报告，测试须符合FCC第15部分限值，并附有SDoC文件。CISPR 32与FCC第15部分B类限值在若干频率子段存在差异，因此通过GB/T 9254的产品不能保证直接通过FCC第15部分，须重新测量。[未经核实：GB/T 9254.1-2021与47 CFR §15.107/§15.109在所有子段的逐频率限值对比；制造商应向认可实验室寻求差距分析。]
summary.zht: 中國GaN充電器製造商通常依據GB/T 9254（等同於CISPR 32，多媒體設備發射標準）取證，該標準為包括開關電源在內的多媒體及IT設備規定了傳導和輻射發射限值。GB/T 9254.1-2021涵蓋A類和B類限值，技術上與CISPR 32:2015對齊。製造商可能同時持有EN 55032（CISPR 32的歐洲採用版）的CE測試報告。但GB/T 9254測試報告和EN 55032測試報告均不被FCC直接接受——FCC要求基於ANSI C63.4的測試報告，測試須符合FCC第15部分限值，並附有SDoC文件。CISPR 32與FCC第15部分B類限值在若干頻率子段存在差異，因此通過GB/T 9254的產品不能保證直接通過FCC第15部分，須重新測量。[未經核實：GB/T 9254.1-2021與47 CFR §15.107/§15.109在所有子段的逐頻率限值對比；製造商應向認可實驗室尋求差距分析。]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 (equivalent to CISPR 32:2015 — Multimedia equipment emissions, Class A and Class B limits)
GB/T 9254 series (superseded earlier editions; current is .1-2021 / .2-2021)
EN 55032 / CISPR 32 (multimedia equipment emissions — used in CE scope, not directly FCC-accepted)

gap.en: Three distinct gaps: (1) Test framework — FCC requires ANSI C63.4-based measurements against FCC Part 15 Class B limits; GB/T 9254 and EN 55032 reports cannot substitute. Limit values differ at certain sub-bands, requiring re-measurement. (2) Lab recognition — As of 2025, FCC has denied recognition of multiple Chinese-government-controlled labs and is actively restricting use of labs in countries without US MRAs. Manufacturers cannot rely on Chinese-lab test data for US SDoC. Use an A2LA-, NVLAP-, ANAB-, or PJLA-accredited lab or a lab in an APEC TEL / ILAC MRA-partner country. (3) SDoC documentation and US responsible party — FCC SDoC requires a responsible party located in the US (or a designated US agent), FCC-specific label text (47 CFR §15.19), and user manual interference notice (§15.105). CE DoC or CCC documentation does not fulfill these requirements. GaN-specific EMI design note: the high switching frequency of GaN devices (100 kHz–10 MHz fundamental, harmonics extending well beyond 1 GHz) makes conducted and radiated EMI harder to suppress than legacy silicon designs; test failure risk is higher and pre-compliance screening is strongly recommended before formal testing.
gap.zh: 存在三项独立差距：（1）测试框架——FCC要求基于ANSI C63.4的测量，对照FCC第15部分B类限值；GB/T 9254与EN 55032报告不可替代，若干子段限值存在差异，须重新测量。（2）实验室认可——截至2025年，FCC已拒绝承认多个中国政府控制实验室，正积极限制在无美国MRA国家实验室出具的测试数据。制造商不能依赖中国实验室测试数据支持美国SDoC，须使用A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB或PJLA认可实验室，或APEC TEL/ILAC MRA合作国实验室。（3）SDoC文件与美国责任方——FCC SDoC要求美国责任方（或指定美国代理人）、FCC专项标签文字（47 CFR §15.19）及用户手册干扰声明（§15.105），CE DoC或CCC文件均不满足上述要求。GaN专项EMI设计说明：GaN器件高开关频率（基波100 kHz–10 MHz，谐波可延伸至1 GHz以上）使传导和辐射EMI抑制难度高于传统硅设计，测试不合格风险较高，正式测试前强烈建议进行预合规筛查。
gap.zht: 存在三項獨立差距：（1）測試框架——FCC要求基於ANSI C63.4的測量，對照FCC第15部分B類限值；GB/T 9254與EN 55032報告不可替代，若干子段限值存在差異，須重新測量。（2）實驗室認可——截至2025年，FCC已拒絕承認多個中國政府控制實驗室，正積極限制在無美國MRA國家實驗室出具的測試數據。製造商不能依賴中國實驗室測試數據支持美國SDoC，須使用A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB或PJLA認可實驗室，或APEC TEL/ILAC MRA合作國實驗室。（3）SDoC文件與美國責任方——FCC SDoC要求美國責任方（或指定美國代理人）、FCC專項標籤文字（47 CFR §15.19）及用戶手冊干擾聲明（§15.105），CE DoC或CCC文件均不滿足上述要求。GaN專項EMI設計說明：GaN器件高開關頻率（基波100 kHz–10 MHz，諧波可延伸至1 GHz以上）使傳導和輻射EMI抑制難度高於傳統矽設計，測試不合格風險較高，正式測試前強烈建議進行預合規篩查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — FCC Part 15 Subpart B Class B limits apply to all switching power supplies (including GaN chargers) marketed or imported into the US for household use
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable as a US export requirement; CN domestic compliance via GB/T 9254 for domestic market only

source.publisher: FCC / US Government Publishing Office (eCFR Title 47 Part 15 Subpart B)

compliance_verdict.en: Gap requires action: Chinese GaN charger manufacturers must obtain new ANSI C63.4-based EMC test reports from an FCC-accepted accredited laboratory (not a Chinese-government-controlled lab), prepare a US-format SDoC with a US responsible party, and update product labeling and user manuals with FCC-specific language. Existing GB/T 9254 or EN 55032 test reports cannot substitute. Given GaN switching frequencies, pre-compliance EMI screening before formal testing is strongly recommended to reduce re-test cost. Informational only — not legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距，需采取行动：中国GaN充电器制造商须从FCC认可的认可实验室（非中国政府控制实验室）取得新的基于ANSI C63.4的EMC测试报告，准备含美国责任方信息的美式SDoC，并更新产品标签和用户手册加入FCC专项语言。现有GB/T 9254或EN 55032测试报告不可替代。考虑到GaN开关频率特性，正式测试前强烈建议进行预合规EMI筛查以降低重测成本。仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距，需採取行動：中國GaN充電器製造商須從FCC認可的認可實驗室（非中國政府控制實驗室）取得新的基於ANSI C63.4的EMC測試報告，準備含美國責任方資訊的美式SDoC，並更新產品標籤和用戶手冊加入FCC專項語言。現有GB/T 9254或EN 55032測試報告不可替代。考慮到GaN開關頻率特性，正式測試前強烈建議進行預合規EMI篩查以降低重測成本。僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: FCC Test Laboratory Recognition — 2025 Restrictions on Chinese-Government-Controlled Labs
requirement_topic.zh: FCC测试实验室认可 — 2025年对中国政府控制实验室的限制
requirement_topic.zht: FCC測試實驗室認可 — 2025年對中國政府控制實驗室的限制

summary.en: For SDoC-authorized devices (including GaN chargers under FCC Part 15 Subpart B), the FCC does not formally mandate use of an FCC-recognized accredited testing laboratory (A2LA, NVLAP, ANAB, PJLA), but test records must demonstrate the equipment was tested under conditions satisfying 47 CFR §2.948. In practice, virtually all importers and retailers require accredited lab reports, and the FCC has stated it may challenge SDoC compliance if testing is not conducted by a competent, accredited lab. Critically, in 2025 the FCC issued orders denying or restricting the recognition of multiple Chinese-government-controlled test laboratories under its Telecommunications Certification Body (TCB) and equipment authorization framework. FCC Report and Order FCC 25-27 (ET Docket No. 24-136, adopted 22 May 2025; Federal Register 2025-13308, published 16 July 2025) prohibits Chinese-government-controlled labs from participating in the equipment authorization program. Labs from Chinese government entities named in proceedings include CTTL/CAICT Beijing (Dkt ET 25-267, DA 25-929) and CAIC Chongqing (Dkt ET 25-268, DA 25-930); by end of 2025 proceedings had been initiated against 15+ labs. Reports from labs affected by these recognition restrictions (R&O FCC 25-27) may not be usable for certification/recognized-lab purposes. For SDoC purposes, choose a competent, accredited lab and document its current acceptability: use an A2LA-, NVLAP-, ANAB-, or PJLA-accredited lab in the US or in an APEC TEL MRA / ILAC MRA partner economy (e.g., Taiwan, Japan, South Korea, EU), and verify current lab recognition status at fcc.gov/oet/ea before commissioning tests.
summary.zh: 对于SDoC授权设备（包括FCC第15部分B子部分下的GaN充电器），FCC并未正式强制要求使用FCC认可的认证测试实验室（A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB、PJLA），但测试记录须证明设备在满足47 CFR §2.948要求的条件下完成测试。实际上，几乎所有进口商和零售商均要求认可实验室报告，FCC亦表示若测试非由称职认可实验室完成，可能对SDoC合规性提出质疑。关键在于，2025年FCC发布命令，拒绝承认或限制多个中国政府控制测试实验室在其电信认证机构（TCB）及设备授权框架下的认可资质。《FCC 25-27命令》（ET Docket编号24-136，2025年5月22日通过；联邦公报2025-13308，2025年7月16日发布）禁止中国政府控制实验室参与设备授权项目。已立案的中国政府实体实验室包括CTTL/CAICT北京（Dkt ET 25-267）和CAIC重庆（Dkt ET 25-268）；截至2025年底，已对15个以上实验室启动程序。受这些认可限制影响的实验室（R&O FCC 25-27）出具的报告可能无法用于认证/被认可实验室目的。就SDoC而言，请选择具备资质的认可实验室并记录其当前可接受性：使用位于美国或APEC TEL MRA/ILAC MRA合作经济体（如台湾、日本、韩国、欧盟）内的A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB或PJLA认可实验室，并在委托测试前在fcc.gov/oet/ea核查实验室当前认可状态。
summary.zht: 對於SDoC授權設備（包括FCC第15部分B子部分下的GaN充電器），FCC並未正式強制要求使用FCC認可的認可測試實驗室（A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB、PJLA），但測試記錄須證明設備在滿足47 CFR §2.948要求的條件下完成測試。實際上，幾乎所有進口商和零售商均要求認可實驗室報告，FCC亦表示若測試非由稱職認可實驗室完成，可能對SDoC合規性提出質疑。關鍵在於，2025年FCC發布命令，拒絕承認或限制多個中國政府控制測試實驗室在其電信認證機構（TCB）及設備授權框架下的認可資質。《FCC 25-27命令》（ET Docket編號24-136，2025年5月22日通過；聯邦公報2025-13308，2025年7月16日發布）禁止中國政府控制實驗室參與設備授權項目。已立案的中國政府實體實驗室包括CTTL/CAICT北京（Dkt ET 25-267）和CAIC重慶（Dkt ET 25-268）；截至2025年底，已對15個以上實驗室啟動程序。受這些認可限制影響的實驗室（R&O FCC 25-27）出具的報告可能無法用於認證/被認可實驗室目的。就SDoC而言，請選擇具備資質的認可實驗室並記錄其當前可接受性：使用位於美國或APEC TEL MRA/ILAC MRA合作經濟體（如台灣、日本、韓國、歐盟）內的A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB或PJLA認可實驗室，並在委托測試前在fcc.gov/oet/ea核查實驗室當前認可狀態。

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR §2.948 (test facility requirements for equipment authorization)
FCC Equipment Authorization Accredited Laboratories list (fcc.gov/oet/ea — verify current status before commissioning tests)

FCC Report and Order FCC 25-27, ET Docket No. 24-136 (adopted 22 May 2025) — prohibiting Chinese-government-controlled labs from equipment authorization program; Federal Register 2025-13308 (July 16, 2025)

summary.en: China operates its own lab accreditation system under CNAS (China National Accreditation Service for Conformity Assessment), which is an ILAC MRA signatory. However, ILAC MRA membership does not automatically entitle a CNAS-accredited lab to be used for FCC Part 15 compliance testing in the US — FCC equipment authorization has its own recognized-lab list and criteria. Chinese manufacturers typically use CNAS-accredited domestic labs for GB/T 9254 compliance and CE-scope CISPR 32 testing for European export. These reports are not FCC-accepted. For FCC SDoC, the manufacturer is responsible for ensuring tests meet §2.948 — in practice this means using a lab explicitly recognized by A2LA, NVLAP, ANAB, or PJLA for FCC Part 15 scope, which Chinese domestic labs currently cannot provide reliably due to 2025 FCC recognition restrictions.
summary.zh: 中国通过CNAS（中国合格评定国家认可委员会）运营自身实验室认可体系，CNAS是ILAC MRA签署方。但ILAC MRA成员资格不自动赋予CNAS认可实验室用于美国FCC第15部分合规测试的资格——FCC设备授权有其自身的认可实验室清单和标准。中国制造商通常使用CNAS认可的国内实验室进行GB/T 9254合规测试和欧洲出口的CISPR 32测试，上述报告不被FCC接受。就FCC SDoC而言，制造商须确保测试满足§2.948要求——实际上须使用经A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB或PJLA明确认可（涵盖FCC第15部分范围）的实验室；由于2025年FCC认可限制，中国国内实验室目前无法可靠提供此类资质。
summary.zht: 中國通過CNAS（中國合格評定國家認可委員會）運營自身實驗室認可體系，CNAS是ILAC MRA簽署方。但ILAC MRA成員資格不自動賦予CNAS認可實驗室用於美國FCC第15部分合規測試的資格——FCC設備授權有其自身的認可實驗室清單和標準。中國製造商通常使用CNAS認可的國內實驗室進行GB/T 9254合規測試和歐洲出口的CISPR 32測試，上述報告不被FCC接受。就FCC SDoC而言，製造商須確保測試滿足§2.948要求——實際上須使用經A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB或PJLA明確認可（涵蓋FCC第15部分範圍）的實驗室；由於2025年FCC認可限制，中國國內實驗室目前無法可靠提供此類資質。

standards_or_laws: CNAS accreditation scheme (ILAC MRA signatory — domestic China, not directly FCC-recognized for Part 15 equipment authorization)
GB/T 9254.1-2021 (domestic CN EMC standard for multimedia equipment — tested at CNAS labs; not FCC-accepted)
ILAC MRA (mutual recognition arrangement — membership does not confer FCC Part 15 lab recognition)

gap.en: Structural gap: Chinese manufacturers have historically used Chinese domestic labs (CNAS-accredited, sometimes government-controlled) for both CN domestic compliance and CE-scope EMC testing. The 2025 FCC restrictions on Chinese-government-controlled labs mean these test reports carry regulatory risk for US SDoC purposes. Manufacturers must engage a non-Chinese FCC-accepted accredited lab for any new US SDoC test campaign. This adds lead time (shipping samples internationally or establishing relationships with Taiwan, Japan, or EU-based labs) and cost. [UNVERIFIED: the precise scope and finality of the 2025 FCC lab restriction orders — verify current list of recognized labs at fcc.gov/oet/ea/fccid before committing to a lab.] Informational only.
gap.zh: 结构性差距：中国制造商历来使用国内实验室（CNAS认可，部分为政府控制）进行国内合规和欧盟CE范围EMC测试。2025年FCC对中国政府控制实验室的限制措施，意味着此类测试报告用于美国SDoC存在监管风险。制造商须为新的美国SDoC测试项目委托非中国的FCC认可认证实验室，这将增加交货时间（需将样品运至台湾、日本或欧盟实验室或建立合作关系）和成本。[未经核实：2025年FCC实验室限制令的具体范围和最终状态——在确定实验室前，请在fcc.gov/oet/ea/fccid核查当前认可实验室清单。] 仅供参考。
gap.zht: 結構性差距：中國製造商歷來使用國內實驗室（CNAS認可，部分為政府控制）進行國內合規和歐盟CE範圍EMC測試。2025年FCC對中國政府控制實驗室的限制措施，意味著此類測試報告用於美國SDoC存在監管風險。製造商須為新的美國SDoC測試項目委託非中國的FCC認可認可實驗室，這將增加交貨時間（需將樣品運至台灣、日本或歐盟實驗室或建立合作關係）和成本。[未經核實：2025年FCC實驗室限制令的具體範圍和最終狀態——在確定實驗室前，請在fcc.gov/oet/ea/fccid核查當前認可實驗室清單。] 僅供參考。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory consideration — while FCC Part 15 SDoC does not formally require a named FCC-recognized lab, using a non-FCC-accepted lab creates enforcement risk; A2LA/NVLAP/ANAB/PJLA accreditation is de facto required by market participants and reduces FCC challenge risk
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — CNAS-accredited labs satisfy CN domestic and CE-scope requirements but are not sufficient for FCC Part 15 SDoC in the current regulatory environment

source.publisher: U.S. Federal Communications Commission — Report and Order FCC 25-27, ET Docket No. 24-136 (May 27, 2025)

compliance_verdict.en: Gap requires action: Chinese GaN charger manufacturers must engage an FCC-accepted accredited lab outside China (A2LA, NVLAP, ANAB, or PJLA scope) for US SDoC EMC testing. Relying on Chinese-government-controlled lab data carries regulatory risk following 2025 FCC restrictions. Verify current lab recognition status at fcc.gov before commissioning tests. Informational only — not legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距，需采取行动：中国GaN充电器制造商须委托中国境外的FCC认可认证实验室（A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB或PJLA认可范围）进行美国SDoC EMC测试。2025年FCC限制措施出台后，依赖中国政府控制实验室数据存在监管风险。委托测试前请在fcc.gov核查实验室当前认可状态。仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距，需採取行動：中國GaN充電器製造商須委託中國境外的FCC認可認可實驗室（A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB或PJLA認可範圍）進行美國SDoC EMC測試。2025年FCC限制措施出台後，依賴中國政府控制實驗室數據存在監管風險。委託測試前請在fcc.gov核查實驗室當前認可狀態。僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。
